title: Why Antibiotics Stop Working
script_summary: Explores how bacteria evolve and the impact of antibiotic misuse on resistance.

segments.voiceover: Bacteria evolve fast – faster than our antibiotics.
This isn't just science fiction. It's happening now with antibiotic resistance.
Every time we misuse antibiotics, we create selection pressure, speeding up the evolution of superbugs.
The CDC warns that these superbugs could lead to untreatable infections worldwide.
But there's hope. Good stewardship can slow this process. Use antibiotics wisely.
Stay informed, share this knowledge, and help fight antibiotic resistance.
